content.full_text:
May 2, 1984

Robert M. Myers  
Santa Monica City Attorney  
1685 Main Street  
Santa Monica, CA 90401-3295

Re: Your Request for Advice, Our Advice No. A-84-079

Dear Mr. Myers:

Pursuant to our discussion, I am confirming that you have withdrawn the above request for an opinion from this office. I am enclosing a copy of the Commission's Siegel Opinion and a copy of a staff advice letter to William Hopkins. Please feel free to contact me if I can be of further assistance.

Sincerely,

[signature]
Diane Maura Fishburn
Counsel
Legal Division

DMF:km
Enclosures
